resources.string: We store a small amount of data about you to improve your experience in the app. This includes:
a unique ID for your account (Push ID)
This does not include any other information you have shared with us or other government services.
Read more about how we use your data in the
Downloading your data will create a PDF you can view, share or save.
This file contains the data we store about you to improve your experience in the GOV.UK app.
Push ID (a unique ID for your account):
